reference_forward.generator: continuous analytic Gaussian gradients plus composite Gauss-Legendre integration on independent axis ray bundles

direct_operator_training.claim_boundary: disjoint synthetic coefficient samples over the same finite analytic mode family; not neural-operator generalization

cases.target_definition: zero-start CGLS field relative-L2 at 24 iterations, post-hoc only
zero-start CGLS field relative-L2 at 24 iterations, post-hoc only

decision.next_gate: confirm PoolFire field semantics/units/refractivity/cameras, then rerun the unchanged ledger on real independent CFD pairs

claim_boundary: The direct map is ridge regression, not DeepONet/FNO/FFNO.
The two cases are analytic manufactured fields, not PoolFire CFD.
The stress case holds out one mode, not a physical geometry.
All field errors are post-hoc and never control solver execution.
Timing is local NumPy micro-runtime; peak end-to-end memory is unavailable.
No real reconstruction, speedup, generalization, or paper claim is made.
